title.en: The Mixed Yuan Canon is not a practice, but it ...

content.en:
The Mixed Yuan True Classic contained the Dao of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and a trace of the breath of the Mixed Yuan Dao leaked out, allowing Ye Tian to see countless profound truths.

The Mixed Yuan Canon is not a practice, but it goes beyond the practice.

In the Mixed Yuan Canon, Ye Tian has seen a lot of understanding and narration of the origin of the law and the rules of heaven and earth, and many of the knowledge that Ye Tian did not know before, or even could not understand.

But now, after browsing the Mixed Yuan Classics, Ye Tian seemed to suddenly open up and saw a different world.

What's more, the Mixed Yuan Classic divides the Great Dao into several levels.

The first level is fur, that is, comprehending the law and stepping into the threshold of the Great Dao, but in fact, there is no deep understanding of the Great Dao.

The second level is form, which manifests the power of the Great Dao, and the Great Dao realm of this level can even be directly used in battle.

The third level is the Law Phase, which condenses the Great Dao into the Law Phase, and the powerful one directly crushes the enemy to death with the Great Dao Realm!

The fourth level is the origin, condensed into the origin of the avenue, itself is equivalent to a small avenue, and everywhere it goes, the other avenues have to retreat and disperse.

There is also a fifth level, that is, on an equal footing with the real Great Dao, which can be called the realm of transcending the Great Dao, and that realm is only a guess even for the Mixed Yuan Supreme, because once that realm is reached, it is very easy to directly transcend the universe.

In the past, Ye Tian knew very little about the Great Dao, and even knew how to improve.

But now, he has some enlightenment.

"According to the above division, I am only in the fur realm now, and I haven't even mastered the shape of the Chaos Dao, the Great Dao has a shape, if I haven't even mastered the form, how to exert the power of the Chaos Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, although he didn't master the form, the Chaos Dao was too powerful, and with his current Chaos Dao realm, it was even enough to match the form realm of the ordinary avenue.

According to the Chaos Yuan True Scripture, galaxy-level powerhouses will try to contact the realm of the form of the Chaos Dao, and the cultivation of the true god level and the great god level is still too low, far from reaching that realm.

Moreover, the lifespan of the True God level and the Great God level is not much, and if they try to pursue the form of the Great Dao early, it will affect their cultivation.

In the past, the human race only had a lifespan of 10,000 years at the god level, 100,000 years at the true god level, 500,000 years at the great god level, 3 million years at the galaxy level, and 10 million years at the galaxy level.

In order to pursue the improvement of cultivation, the True God level and the Great God level naturally do not waste time pursuing the form of the Great Dao, maybe the life span is exhausted, and they will not be able to reach the form of the Great Dao.

Even the Children of the Universe did not dare to pursue the form of the Great Dao too early, because the Children of the Universe needed to improve too many aspects.

For example, Ye Tian himself is talented against the sky, and even has a talent for time, but he also feels that time is not enough, because he has too many aspects to improve.

However, now Ye Tian doesn't need to worry about time, his current lifespan is enough to support the day the universe collapses.

Therefore, he can completely pursue the realm of the shape of the Great Dao.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian was immersed in the perception of the Mixed Yuan Classic.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian put down the Mixed Yuan True Classic and left this hall.

At this time, although he didn't know much about the Mixed Yuan True Classic, he still gained too much.

It doesn't help much to continue reading, you just need to slowly study and digest and absorb it in the future.

After coming out of the Wandian Temple, Li Xin'er appeared in front of Ye Tian again.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I'll take you to a quieter place to have a good chat about the situation in that chaotic small world!"

Li Xin'er said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He was also very interested in that chaotic small world, so he followed Li Xin'er and left.

An attic.

Ye Tian and Li Xin'er sat facing each other, and the two soon began to talk about the chaotic small world.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I mentioned the small world of chaos to you before, but there are some details that I haven't mentioned. That small chaotic world was not too big, and even a little dilapidated, but there were still many chaotic creatures. But don't worry, according to our preliminary investigation, all the chaos creatures in this small chaotic world that have surpassed the galaxy level have died!"

Li Xin'er said.

"Beyond the galaxy level is dead?"

Ye Tian was quite surprised, and immediately asked, "Why did you die?"

"Because the origin of the universe prohibits these powerful chaotic creatures from entering the universe, otherwise, our universe would have been invaded by the terrifying existence in the chaos. When this chaotic small world was swallowed by the universe, these powerful chaotic creatures didn't have time to escape, and because of the ban of the universe, they were directly wiped out by the universe. There were only a few weak chaotic creatures left, unable to threaten the universe, so they survived. Of course, even a god-level chaos creature has a very terrifying strength. In addition, it seems that because the rules have changed, creatures at the galaxy level and above cannot enter that chaotic small world, and at most only creatures at the great god level and below are allowed to enter that chaotic small world!"

Li Xin'er explained.

"Xin'er Fairy, according to the content of the transaction, I can enter the Chaos Small World, I don't know what good things are in the Chaos Small World?" Ye Tian asked.

Li Xin'er said: "A few days ago, we sent in a batch of puppets from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and according to the pictures recorded by several living puppets, there are many rare chaos elixirs and spirit plants growing in this chaotic small world, and there are also rich chaotic spar veins. The most important thing is that there is a high probability that a Chaos Spirit Treasure was born inside!"

"Chaos Spirit Treasure!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

He really knew the existence of the Chaos Spirit Treasure, and it was rumored that the Chaos Spirit Treasure was an innate weapon contained in the chaos, and in terms of grade, it was almost not weaker than the strongest treasure in the universe!

"If there really is a Chaos Spirit Treasure, you Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain will let me in, aren't you afraid that I will take away the Chaos Spirit Treasure?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

"Don't be afraid!"

Li Xin'er said with a smile: "Because of the affairs of the Chaos Small World, the nine supreme forces of the Terran and the Supreme Hall of the Terran are all known, and once they obtain the Chaos Spirit Treasure, they will be sent to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race." Therefore, even if you obtain the Chaos Spirit Treasure, you need to hand it over to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race. "

Ye Tian shrugged his shoulders and couldn't refute it.

However, even if he obtained the Chaos Spirit Treasure, it would not be of much use to him, and he would not be able to use it at all with his current cultivation.

For example, that Chaos Black Lotus is definitely a treasure above the Chaos Spirit Treasure, but unfortunately he can't use it now, and he doesn't know its use at all.

Therefore, he has little interest in this kind of treasure.

But there are too many treasures in the small world of chaos, and he may encounter some treasures that will be of great help to him.

"When will you enter the small world of chaos?"

Ye Tian asked.

"In another half a year, after that chaotic small world was swallowed in, it has been in turmoil, and now it is about to calm down, that is, half a year. If you enter at this time, it is very dangerous. Some of the puppets that were sent in before were damaged a lot because of the turmoil. Li Xin'er explained.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

It's just that waiting for another half a year is nothing to him.

In the blink of an eye.

Half a year has passed.

On this day, Li Xin'er informed Ye Tian that she could enter the small world of chaos.
